# Asset/Item Template

## Format

```
**[Name]** - [Category]

Bonus: [mechanical effect]
Limitation: [cost or restriction]
```

## Placeholders

| Placeholder | Description | Example |
|-------------|-------------|---------|
| `[Name]` | Item name | "Medkit" |
| `[Category]` | Item type | "Gear", "Weapon", "Vehicle" |
| `[Bonus]` | Mechanical benefit | "+1 to heal, removes 1-harm" |
| `[Limitation]` | Restriction | "Single use", "Requires ammo" |

## Customization Notes

Adapt this template based on the game system:
- For weapons: add `Damage:`, `Range:`, `Tags:`
- For armor: add `Protection:`, `Mobility penalty:`
- For consumables: add `Uses:`, `Refresh:`
- For vehicles: add `Speed:`, `Capacity:`, `Armor:`
- For magic items: add `Attunement:`, `Charges:`
